meta.description: Bidirectional graph of Kolkata bus stops. Each node is a stop; edges represent direct bus connections between consecutive stops on a route.
meta.note: Edges are stored bidirectionally (A->B and B->A both present) since buses run both ways along their stop sequence as given in source data.
